experiences.title: Frontend Developer
experiences.description: This was my first exeprience with a whole team of front and back colleagues. I participated in a React and Typescript project at Barcelona Activa, developing a free student wiki for an internal project. I sharpened my skills in Scrum methodology, git flow and RESTful APIs.

experiences.title: Design System Frontend Developer
experiences.description: I'm a developer at SheHub, a platform that connects woman in tech to real-world projects, collaborating in cross-functional teams. I'm part of the Design System team, building a reliable product one component at a time, reusable and in line with SheHub's branding.
